title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
